The width is 6 meters, and the length is 12 meters. The perimeter is calculated as 2*(width + length) = 2*(6 + 12) = 36 meters. * * *  
The dimensions of the room are 6 meters by 12 meters. The engineer emphasized the importance of accurate measurements to ensure the room is properly designed. * * *
